title: Component Tokens Sidecar
description: Flat slot pool for a single component. Each top-level key is a slot name (e.g. "switch.color.track.background.default"); each value is a tokenResolution that resolves the slot to the global token graph (or carries a literal). The slot is declared as a CSS custom property on the component's root selector and read by consumers in <Name>.styles.json. No anatomy/state grouping; no `property` field — which property reads the slot is the concern of styles.json.

tokenResolution.description: Resolution for a single slot: either backs to a global token via `resolvesTo` + `fallback`, or carries a literal CSS value via `literal`. Hardcoded values that are intentionally not token-backed should use `literal`.

oneOf.description: Token reference — resolves via the global token graph as var(--<resolvesTo>, <fallback>).
Literal CSS value — not a token reference. Use for intentional hardcodes that should NOT be themable.

resolvesTo.description: Dotted path into the global token graph (e.g. "semantic.color.background.tertiary", "core.spacing.size.09"), without the -- prefix.

fallback.description: Hardcoded fallback — the second argument passed to var() in the emitted slot declaration.

literal.description: Hardcoded CSS value, mutually exclusive with `resolvesTo`+`fallback`.

layer.description: Expected resolution layer for resolvesTo. Defaults to "semantic".
